'''âng-ng-y-k''' ('''kangangyekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrophoretise|electrophoretise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrophoretise|electrophoretise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-ng-y-k
|-
! Lemma
| kangangyekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingangyekoko|thingangyekoko]] || [[word:jingangyekoko|jingangyekoko]] || [[word:shingangyekoko|shingangyekoko]] || [[word:kingangyekoko|kingangyekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungangyekoko|thuthungangyekoko]] || [[word:jujungangyekoko|jujungangyekoko]] || [[word:shushungangyekoko|shushungangyekoko]] || [[word:kukungangyekoko|kukungangyekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
